Finish setting up %s before enabling it.
To continue, please update your %s plugi: To continue, please update your %s plugin to the latest version. This update includes critical security enhancements and new features.
Would you like to update now?: Would you like to update now?
Failed to reset: missing reset URL. Plea: Failed to reset: missing reset URL. Please refresh and try again.
When you reset the %s onboarding your pr: When you reset the %s onboarding your progress and the provided data will be lost. This action cannot be undone, but you can restart the onboarding any time.
You need to reset your test account to c: You need to reset your test account to continue onboarding with %1$s. This will create a new test account and reset any existing %2$s account details and test transactions.
Provide some additional details about yo: Provide some additional details about your business so you can begin accepting real payments. {{link}}Learn more{{/link}}
When you reset your account, all payment: When you reset your account, all payment data — including your %s account details, test transactions, and payouts history — will be lost. Your order history will remain. This action cannot be undone, but you can create a new test account at any time.
Are you sure you'd like to continue?: Are you sure you'd like to continue?
Finish completing the tasks required to: Finish completing the tasks required to launch your store.
We've created a test account for you so: We've created a test account for you so that you can begin testing payments on your store. {{break/}}Not sure what to test? Take a look at {{link}}how to test payments{{/link}}.
When you reset your test account, all pa: When you reset your test account, all payment data — including your %s account details, test transactions, and payouts history — will be lost. Your order history will remain. This action cannot be undone, but you can create a new test account at any time.
An error occurred. You will be redirecte: An error occurred. You will be redirected to the settings page, try enabling the payment gateway there.
